mapper.sql: user_id, user_ip, user_name, user_nickname, user_pwd, user_email, user_headpic, user_regist_time, user_bir, user_age, user_phone
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from users
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into users (user_id, user_ip, user_name, user_nickname, user_pwd, user_email, user_headpic, user_regist_time, user_bir, user_age, user_phone) values (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into users
user_id,
user_ip,
user_name,
user_nickname,
user_pwd,
user_email,
user_headpic,
user_regist_time,
user_bir,
user_age,
user_phone,
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update users
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_ip = #{record.userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_nickname = #{record.userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_pwd = #{record.userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_email = #{record.userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_headpic = #{record.userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_regist_time = #{record.userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_bir = #{record.userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_age = #{record.userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_phone = #{record.userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update users set user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_ip = #{record.userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_nickname = #{record.userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_pwd = #{record.userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_email = #{record.userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_headpic = #{record.userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_regist_time = #{record.userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_bir = #{record.userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_age = #{record.userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_phone = #{record.userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update users
user_ip = #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_nickname = #{userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_pwd = #{userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_email = #{userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_headpic = #{userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_regist_time = #{userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_bir = #{userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_age = #{userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_phone = #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update users set user_ip = #{userIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_nickname = #{userNickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_pwd = #{userPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_email = #{userEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_headpic = #{userHeadpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_regist_time = #{userRegistTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_bir = #{userBir,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_age = #{userAge,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_phone = #{userPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select user_id, user_ip, user_name, user_nickname, user_pwd, user_email, user_headpic, user_regist_time, user_bir, user_age, user_phone from chengxuba.users where user_name=#{userName} and user_pwd=#{userPwd}
select user_id, user_ip, user_name, user_nickname, user_pwd, user_email, user_headpic, user_regist_time, user_bir, user_age, user_phone from chengxuba.users where user_name=#{username}
